payload.text: The register: Anthropic has lower user numbers, yet higher LLM revenue than OpenAI. The striking part is scale versus monetization, because Anthropic did this with about 134M monthly users while OpenAI had roughly 900M, pointing to much higher ARPU and much stronger reach into
